title: Cisco Expressway Registration
description: Schema for a device registration on Cisco Expressway. Represents an endpoint or device currently registered with the Expressway using SIP or H.323 protocols, including contact address, registration time, and subzone assignment.

Alias.description: Registered alias of the device, such as a SIP URI or H.323 alias

ContactAddress.description: Network contact address of the device, including IP address and port

RegisteredAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the device registered

ExpiresAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the registration expires and must be renewed

DeviceType.description: Type or model of the registered device as reported during registration

Subzone.description: Subzone where the device is registered based on IP address ranges or alias patterns. Endpoints not matching any configured subzone are assigned to the DefaultSubzone.
